prompts.name: agent
prompts.summary: General voice-first preset for interactive CLI and GUI use.
prompts.review_notes: Use for day-to-day assistant behavior, not benchmark-only runs.

prompts.name: tool_benchmark
prompts.summary: Benchmark preset focused on reliable tool selection and retry behavior.
prompts.review_notes: Intended for benchmark and regression runs that stress tool routing.

prompts.name: tool_reliability
prompts.summary: Minimal preset for local tool-routing smoke tests and UAT.
prompts.review_notes: Short on purpose; compare against richer prompts during review.
